headline: Which S&P500 stocks are gapping on Wednesday?
summary: Curious about the market action on Wednesday? Dive into the US markets to explore the gap up and gap down stocks in the S&P500 index during today's session.

headline: WIX Beats Q4 Earnings Estimates on Revenue Momentum, Wins $250M Deal
summary: WIX tops Q4 2025 EPS estimates as AI push and Base44's $100M ARR milestone fuel growth, eyes mid-teens 2026 revenue rise.

headline: Assessing CDW (CDW) Valuation After A Year Of Weak Shareholder Returns
summary: CDW stock at a glance after recent performance CDW (CDW) has drawn fresh attention after a challenging past year, with the share price showing negative total returns over the past month, past 3 months, year to date, and over the last year. With annual revenue of US$22.4b and net income of US$1.1b, the company remains in focus for investors assessing how recent share performance aligns with its role as a large IT solutions provider.
